## Summary
What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue
Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How was it tested?
- [ ] `python smoke_test.py` passes against a running server
- [ ] Affected client(s) tested manually (extension / CLI)
- [ ] `python -m compileall src` is clean

## Checklist
- [ ] Updated `documentation.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed
- [ ] Preserves the Un-doomed philosophy — guides with questions; never
      auto-writes the user's fix
